summary:
The dataset has been pre-processed, resulting in a cleaned dataset with 10 rows and 10 columns.

The columns in the cleaned dataset are:
`promo_id`, `code`, `discount_type`, `discount_value`, `min_order_value`, `start_date`, `end_date`, `times_used`, `max_uses`, and `active`.

This dataset contains information about various promotions, including unique identifiers, promotion codes, discount types and values, minimum order requirements, validity dates, and usage statistics.
